action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 15 just finished (~61 min) continuing training from the best checkpoint (iter_8, 49.6% success) for an additional 5M timesteps with the stable 4-frame stack and 512-dim architecture. Remaining time budget is only ~0.035 hours (~125 seconds). Analysis: No further training is possible. The iter_15 checkpoint is the most promising candidate because it builds on the best-known configuration. I must submit it for evaluation immediately before the time budget expires. Decision: Submit eval for checkpoints/iter_15 using predict.py.
